SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.allocation

Class UnitSplit

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.allocation.UnitSplit
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class UnitSplit extends Object implements Serializable
Frozen per-component split (recovery) factors for a single conservative process unit.

For a non-reactive, mass-conserving unit, the fraction of a component entering the unit that leaves through a given outlet depends only on the mixed inlet state (temperature, pressure and bulk composition), not on which source the moles came from. A UnitSplit captures those fractions, extracted once from a rigorous base-case run, for every (outlet, component) pair:

$$f_u(s,k) = \frac{\dot{n}_{s,k}^{\,out}}{\sum_{i\in inlets} \dot{n}_{i,k}^{\,in}}$$

where s is an outlet stream and k a component. By component conservation the factors satisfy sum_s f_u(s,k) = 1 for every component k with non-zero inlet flow. Single-outlet pass-through units (pumps, compressors, coolers, heaters, valves) reduce to the identity factor f = 1.

The factors are linear in the inlet flows, which is what makes the downstream allocation network (see AllocationNetwork) a linear system that can be solved by superposition.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team

    Master component names (common slate) the factor columns are indexed by.

    private final double[][]
    factors
    Split factors indexed as factors[outletIndex][componentIndex].
    private final double[]

    Total inlet molar flow per component (mole/sec), for reference and diagnostics.

    Inlet streams of the unit (edge carriers in the proxy network).
    private final List<StreamInterface>

    Outlet streams of the unit (edge carriers in the proxy network).

    private final String
    unitName
    Name of the process unit these factors belong to.

  • Field Details

    • serialVersionUID

      private static final long serialVersionUID
      Serialization version UID.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • unitName

      private final String unitName
      Name of the process unit these factors belong to.

    • equipmentType

      private final String equipmentType
      Simple class name of the unit (e.g. Separator, Mixer).

    • inletStreams

      private final List<StreamInterface> inletStreams
      Inlet streams of the unit (edge carriers in the proxy network).

    • outletStreams

      private final List<StreamInterface> outletStreams
      Outlet streams of the unit (edge carriers in the proxy network).

    • componentNames

      private final String[] componentNames
      Master component names (common slate) the factor columns are indexed by.

    • factors

      private final double[][] factors
      Split factors indexed as factors[outletIndex][componentIndex].

    • inletComponentFlow

      private final double[] inletComponentFlow
      Total inlet molar flow per component (mole/sec), for reference and diagnostics.

  • Constructor Details

    • UnitSplit

      public UnitSplit(String unitName, String equipmentType, List<StreamInterface> inletStreams, List<StreamInterface> outletStreams, String[] componentNames, double[][] factors, double[] inletComponentFlow)
      Creates a frozen split-factor record for one unit.
      Parameters:
      unitName - the unit name; must be non-null
      equipmentType - simple class name of the unit; must be non-null
      inletStreams - the inlet streams of the unit; must be non-null
      outletStreams - the outlet streams of the unit; must be non-null
      componentNames - the master component slate the factor columns map to; must be non-null
      factors - split factors [outletIndex][componentIndex]; must be non-null and sized outletStreams.size() x componentNames.length
      inletComponentFlow - total inlet molar flow per component in mole/sec; must be non-null and sized componentNames.length

  • Method Details

    • getUnitName

      public String getUnitName()
      Gets the unit name.
      Returns:
      the unit name

    • getEquipmentType

      public String getEquipmentType()
      Gets the simple class name of the unit.
      Returns:
      the equipment type

    • getInletStreams

      public List<StreamInterface> getInletStreams()
      Gets the inlet streams of this unit.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of inlet streams

    • getOutletStreams

      public List<StreamInterface> getOutletStreams()
      Gets the outlet streams of this unit.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of outlet streams

    • getOutletCount

      public int getOutletCount()
      Gets the number of outlet streams.
      Returns:
      the outlet count

    • getComponentNames

      public String[] getComponentNames()
      Gets the master component slate the factor columns are indexed by.
      Returns:
      a copy of the component name array

    • getFactor

      public double getFactor(int outletIndex, int componentIndex)
      Gets the split factor for a given outlet index and component index.
      Parameters:
      outletIndex - zero-based outlet index in getOutletStreams()
      componentIndex - zero-based component index in getComponentNames()
      Returns:
      the split factor (fraction of the component leaving through that outlet)

    • getInletComponentFlow

      public double getInletComponentFlow(int componentIndex)
      Gets the total inlet molar flow of a component (mole/sec) for this unit in the base case.
      Parameters:
      componentIndex - zero-based component index in getComponentNames()
      Returns:
      the total inlet molar flow in mole/sec
